scripts.verify:phase2: pnpm --filter @construct/shared typecheck && pnpm verify:phase1 && pnpm --filter @construct/runner typecheck && pnpm --filter @construct/runner test
scripts.verify:phase3: pnpm verify:phase2 && pnpm --filter @construct/shared build && pnpm --filter @construct/runner build && pnpm --filter @construct/runner task:test
scripts.verify:phase4: pnpm verify:phase3 && pnpm --filter @construct/app typecheck && pnpm --filter @construct/app build
